c.d: Refers to the intuitiveness and simplicity of the app's interface and features, allowing users to quickly create collages without a steep learning curve.
The number and diversity of pre-designed templates available within the app, catering to different styles and occasions.
The extent to which users can personalize their collages, including adjusting layouts, adding text, stickers, backgrounds, and filters.
The availability and quality of built-in photo editing tools, such as cropping, rotating, color adjustments, and special effects.
The ease with which users can share their collages on social media platforms directly from the app.
Whether the free version of the app adds a watermark to the created collages.
The frequency and intrusiveness of advertisements displayed within the app.
The pricing model of the app, including whether it is free, offers in-app purchases, or requires a subscription.
The average rating and the general sentiment expressed in user reviews on app stores.
Availability of features like AI-powered editing, video collage creation, and object removal.
